title: tanacetum leucanthemum var. maximum
intro: Tanacetum leucanthemum var. maximum, also known as Tansy Max or Large Flowered Tansy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as digestive problems and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Tanacetum leucanthemum var. maximum include reducing fever, relieving anxiety and stress, and acting as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
